'''FLTCH R-1''' was a [[FLTCH-series battle droid]] created by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Biography==
Originally programmed by [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] and [[Bron (Human)|Bron]] to kill [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], Ki was able to disable him and escape. However, later when a crew was needed for Ki's personal starship, droids on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] were few and far between. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] agents outfitting him recovered FLTCH from the [[Outsider Citadel/Legends|Outsider Citadel]] and reprogrammed him as a pilot. FLTCH accompanied Ki on at least one mission, a rescue mission to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. There he served not only as his pilot, but his bodyguard.

R-1 was outfitted with sharp claws on his hands, a wrist mounted [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and a [[Missile launcher/Legends|rocket launcher]].
